title: Fix HEIC scan error and add rescan confirmation dialog
description: Ensure HEIC images are converted to JPEG in memory before sending to Ollama to prevent 400 errors, and implement a dry_run and force_rescan flow in both backend and frontend to confirm rescan behaviour.
close_reason: Implemented HEIC image support by converting HEIC images to JPEG in-memory before sending to Ollama, added dry_run and force_rescan parameters to timeline scope API, added rescan confirmation dialog on folders page, and successfully ran all tests.

title: Use selected Ollama model for scan warm-up
description: Fix AI scan warm-up using default llama instead of the model selected in Settings after backend restart. Carry active_model in scan queue requests and retry transient Ollama warm-up failures before pausing.
close_reason: Fixed selected Ollama model propagation for AI scan warm-up, added warm-up retries, covered backend/frontend paths, and verified backend/frontend coverage above 85%.

title: Make README feature summary more coherent
description: Condense README version feature history into a clear summary and point detailed change history to CHANGELOG.md for review before merge.
close_reason: Condensed README feature summary and fixed markdownlint issues.

title: Refactor scan and settings navigation
description: Split scan/settings UI, rename test scan page, and adjust navigation labels/order per user request.
close_reason: Implemented scan/settings page split, merged scan panel, navigation relabeling, tests, version bump, and graphify update.

title: Update Graphify outputs with new ignore rules
description: Re-run Graphify update after adding .graphifyignore and commit/push the pruned graph files.
close_reason: Ran graphify update to apply ignore rules and committed the updated outputs.

title: Add Graphify workflow to instructions
description: Update AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md outside of beads integration blocks to instruct agents to update the codebase graph when committing code changes.
close_reason: Added Graphify maintenance workflow to AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md

title: Create .graphifyignore file
description: Define a .graphifyignore file to exclude build files, configuration files, test suites, and media/test data, thereby optimizing the graphify knowledge graph and reducing token usage.
close_reason: Created .graphifyignore and explained Gemini session compatibility

title: Warm Ollama model before AI scans
description: Preload the active Ollama model before background AI scan queues start and document Ollama preload/keep-alive options in README to reduce first-image 500 errors from cold model loads.
close_reason: Implemented Ollama model warm-up before AI scans, keep_alive configuration, README guidance, and tests. Verified backend pytest coverage at 86% and frontend build.

title: Bulk queue timeline items for AI scans
description: Add local folder timeline bulk actions under date breadcrumbs to send visible year/month/day image items to Full AI or CLIP scan queues, auto ignoring screenshots where applicable, with focused tests and coverage preserved.
close_reason: Implemented bulk timeline AI queue actions with backend date-scope endpoint and coverage verification.

title: Add global scan progress panel
description: Show active AI and local folder scan progress in a compact responsive panel across app pages, with collapsible queue details and test coverage maintained.
close_reason: Implemented global scan activity panel with tests and coverage verification.

title: Improve backend test coverage to 85%+
description: Add/expand tests to cover scan_worker.py, system.py routes, and other untested files to raise backend test coverage from 81% to >= 85%.
close_reason: Successfully expanded test suites in test_worker.py and test_api_extra.py, achieving 86% overall backend coverage and 100% on system routes.

title: Fix Vite CSS nesting warning and raise frontend coverage to 85%
description: Fix the PostCSS nesting configuration to resolve the Vite CSS nesting warning, and add additional behavior-focused tests to push statement coverage of the frontend over 85%.
close_reason: Closed

title: Frontend coverage phase 8 final threshold ratchet
description: Finalize frontend coverage thresholds and runner scripts from Phase 8 of plans/frontend-coverage-85-plan.md. Resolve remaining ScanTest/VideoPlayer coverage gap by tests or explicit coverage scope.
close_reason: Phase 8 complete: covered ScanTest and VideoPlayer, ratcheted frontend thresholds to verified coverage floor, and verified coverage/build/front-end runner.

title: Frontend coverage phase 7 DuplicatesPage remaining gaps
description: Add Phase 7 behavior tests for DuplicatesPage and dateFormatters from plans/frontend-coverage-85-plan.md, then ratchet thresholds if coverage improves.
close_reason: Completed Phase 7 DuplicatesPage/dateFormatter coverage, threshold ratchet, and plan update.

title: Frontend coverage phase 6 Identify workflows
description: Add behavior-focused Identify workflow tests from Phase 6 of plans/frontend-coverage-85-plan.md and ratchet thresholds if coverage improves.
close_reason: Completed Phase 6 Identify workflow tests, accessibility labels, threshold ratchet, and plan update.

title: Frontend coverage phase 5 Gallery workflows
description: Add behavior-focused Gallery workflow tests from Phase 5 of plans/frontend-coverage-85-plan.md and ratchet thresholds if coverage improves.
close_reason: Completed Phase 5 Gallery workflow coverage, accessibility labels for tested controls, threshold ratchet, and plan update.

title: Frontend coverage phase 4 FoldersPage workflows
description: Add behavior-focused FoldersPage workflow tests from Phase 4 of plans/frontend-coverage-85-plan.md and ratchet thresholds if coverage improves.
close_reason: Completed Phase 4 FoldersPage workflow tests, ratcheted frontend coverage thresholds, and updated coverage plan.

title: Frontend coverage phase 3 SettingsPage workflows
description: Implement Phase 3 of plans/frontend-coverage-85-plan.md: expand SettingsPage tests from render checks into workflow coverage for model selection, theme persistence, folder scan controls, backups/restores, clean database, and API error paths.
notes: Phase 3 implemented: SettingsPage workflow tests now cover model selection, theme persistence, AI scan payloads, force-rescan confirmation, non-AI folder scans, scan-history path selection, backup creation, restore confirmation, and two-step main database clean confirmation. Verified npx vitest run src/components/__tests__/SettingsPage.test.tsx, npm run test:coverage, and npm run build. Overall coverage now 56.77 statements / 50.70 branches / 48.08 functions / 58.81 lines; SettingsPage lines now 79.74%.
close_reason: Phase 3 SettingsPage workflow coverage implemented and verified.

title: Frontend coverage phase 2 component tests
description: Implement Phase 2 of plans/frontend-coverage-85-plan.md: add focused tests for Toast, ErrorBoundary, ConfirmDialog, and EntityRow, then verify focused tests and coverage.
notes: Phase 2 implemented: added Toast, ErrorBoundary, ConfirmDialog, and EntityRow tests. Focused tests pass, npm run test:coverage passes at ratcheted thresholds, and npm run build passes. Overall coverage now 49.92 statements / 44.49 branches / 40.66 functions / 51.63 lines.
close_reason: Phase 2 component coverage tests implemented and verified.

title: Frontend coverage phase 1 config baseline
description: Implement Phase 1 of plans/frontend-coverage-85-plan.md: exclude test infrastructure from Vitest coverage, add product-code coverage reporters and baseline thresholds, and verify coverage/build.
notes: Phase 1 implemented: Vitest coverage now excludes src/test/** and src/types.ts, emits text/html/json-summary reports, and enforces passing product-code baseline thresholds. Verified npm run test:coverage and npm run build.
close_reason: Phase 1 coverage configuration implemented and verified.
